owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP.md next worker-ready slice after v0-sprint-033

chunks.title: Surface previous host availability in SNC CLI
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Multiplayer Generated Overlay Distribution / SNC CLI status surfaces
chunks.goal: Expose explicit `previous_host_available` continuity state in stable SNC CLI/stdout status output so terminal-driven and automation consumers do not need to reparse JSON or freeform MP status text for host-rotation continuity facts.
acceptance: Stable SNC CLI/stdout status output exposes an explicit `previous_host_available` field for the current MP package.
The CLI/stdout field names stay aligned with the existing JSON/tray continuity contract and degraded-handoff next-action semantics.
tools/run_v0_pipeline_tests.ps1 fails closed if the explicit previous-host continuity field disappears from SNC CLI/stdout status surfaces.

chunks.title: Refresh progress after SNC CLI continuity slice
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Task Board And Owner Report Log
chunks.goal: Keep roadmap notes, sprint queue, and owner-facing daily summary aligned after SNC CLI previous-host availability surfacing lands.
acceptance: Roadmap next-worker-ready notes mention the shipped SNC CLI previous-host availability surface once tests pass.
The sprint queue is refreshed to the next bounded roadmap slice instead of leaving stale completed chunks.
The daily freework report is replaced without creating report spam.
